name: komand-context7
description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via the Context7 CLI before answering questions about any framework, SDK, or API.
shortDescription: Pull current library docs via the Context7 CLI before answering API or framework questions
longDescription: Wraps the official `ctx7` CLI (from upstash/context7) so the agent fetches authoritative, up-to-date docs whenever the user asks about a library, framework, SDK, API, or CLI tool — even ones the model thinks it knows. The skill teaches the two-step workflow (resolve a name to a library ID, then query docs against that ID), how to pick the best match, when to use the `--research` retry flag, and which scenarios to skip (refactors, business-logic debugging, general programming concepts). No MCP server: pure CLI invocation via `npx ctx7@latest`, so it works in any environment with Node available.
defaultPrompt: Use Context7 to fetch fresh library documentation before answering API, framework, or SDK questions. Run `npx ctx7@latest library <name> "<question>"` to find the library ID, then `npx ctx7@latest docs <id> "<question>"` to read the docs.
